rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUSTAVO P. SERAFIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/20/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sale must be filed to support the statutory fee. [CRC 7.705(b) and 7.550(b)(6).] (2) All beneficiaries' consents to the proposed non-pro rata distribution must be filed. [LRSF 14.35 I.6.ii.] (3) Please file current Letters (or the equivalent thereof) evidencing that Gisela Segredo is still the guardian of Sonia Diaz. [LRSF 14.35 D.] (4) Is Sonia Diaz not entitled to direct notice? [CRC 7.51(c)(2).] (5) Paragraph 8 of the petition is a little vague. From whom is the administrator expecting receipt of death benefits and estimated taxes? (6) Additional assets or receipts not actually marshaled or accounted for cannot be part of the fee base. Furthermore, the amendment seems to indicate that the amount of anticipated tax refunds was not $11,700.00 or $177.00  (7) What happened to the coin and money collection appraised at $2,100? (8) Please file proof of the surrender of the revolver. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/9/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENIO A. VILLACARLOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/27/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The petition does not address the assignments of Roel C. Villacarlos. [LRSF 14.35 B.] (2) The legal description of any real property to be distributed must be set forth in the petition (as well as in the body of the order, not in an exhibit to the order). [CRC 7.651(b).] (3) The Request for Special Notice filed on 5/23/24 by Probate Advance requested that notice be mailed to an address in Rye Brook, NY, not Newport Beach, CA. It appears that an amendment to the petition must be filed to address the assignments (and the other issues above.) Deadline is 8/16/24 for providing the assigned examiner a revised proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Item 4 of an I&A should NOT be completed when a probate referee HAS BEEN appointed.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOUGLAS J OERTEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/20/2024. (No earlier availability.) An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] Notice of AMENDED PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION must be mailed and published (clearly showing that an AMENDED petition has been filed and will be heard). Mailed notice must always include the instructions for how to appear remotely or via CourtCall. Please provide a courtesy copies of any new filed papers to the assigned examiner by 8/9/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval on report of status of administration will be set for 08/12/2025.
